title: Easy 24 Hr Thick Toilet Bleach Cleaner 750ml - 12 Pack | Thick Bleach for Toilet Cleaner, Kills 99.9% Bacteria, With 1 Pair DirtBuster Medium Household for Cleaning by Direct Mart Ltd
features: Toilet Bleach kills 99.9% bacteria and bleach toilet cleaner leave hygienically clean and smelling fresh toilet with every flush
Thick bleach kills Pseudomonas Aeruginosa, E.Coil, MRSA, Salmonella & Listeria when used neat.
Remove limescale & stain. Bleach thick easily reaches under the toilet rim. Keep your toilet bowl & sink clean all the time with fresh smell.
Case size contains 12 bottles of 750ml and best option for bleach bulk buy

DirtBuster gloves are comfortable, strong and tough with a non-slip grip gloves comes with Medium size. Rubber gloves design for multi purpose use like cleaning, kitchen use & washing up. Also protect against harmful liquids.
description: Product Description POWER24 HR Bleach with DirtBuster Rubber Gloves Bulk pack: EASY24 HR BLEACH COMES IN 12 PACK WHICH MAKES PERFECTLY FIRST CHOICE FOR ANY BULK BUYER EITHER FOR INDUSTRIAL USE OR HOUSEHOLD USE. Keep the house safe: EASY24 HR THICK BLEACH MULTI-PURPOSE DISINFECTION IS IDEAL TO DISINFECT & HYGIENICALLY CLEAN MULTI PURPOSE SURFACE. THIS BLEACH STRONG ENOUGH TO DEFENCE AGAINST SOME DANGEROUS GERMS & BACTERIA SUCH AS PSEUDOMONAS, AERUGINOSA, E.COIL, MRSA, SALMONELLA, LISTERIA ETC. How to use: TOILET : DIRECT NEAT BLEACH AROUND THE BOWL & LEAVE FOR 5 MIN. BEFOR THE FLASHING TO KILL BACTERIA, FUNGI & VIRUES SINK: DIRECT NEAT DOWN THE WASTEPIPE TO DISINFECT. LEAVE FOR 5 MIN AND THEN RINSE AWAY BEST PRACTISE TO USE THIS BLEACH BY ALWAYS WEARING GLOVES TO PROTECT YOURSELF 99% Protective EASY24 HR BLEACH HAS SOME STRONG INGREDIENTS ALONG WITH PERFUME & LIMONENE TO LEAVE THE FRESH SMELL ALL WITH EVERY FLASH. Household Rubber Gloves Great for the Bathroom - High Qulity Rubber Perfect Washing Up Gloves - Long Durability All Purpose household Gloves - Non Slipper give you strong hold
